# Habit Tracker · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:45 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 26, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _QuizoidZ_, Jul 14, 2026, 1/5: "I love the layout, style, and customization. I prefer a “checklist” style which you can set by putting every goal at a 1/1, but it is interesting this kind of goal, things you do once a day, isn’t innate in the system. Also, the app keeps asking me to rate it… almost daily. Once is enough. 🤣 -1 ⭐️ This is a pretty cool app, but there’s some glitch where even after putting in my 5-star review it keeps asking for them. -1 ⭐️🤣🤣 -1 ⭐️ This is like every day 🤣🤣🤣 -1 ⭐️Now I’m down to one star. Maybe they’ll notice and turn off the constant review nagging. 🤣"
            2. _Krystynakris_, Apr 26, 2026, 3/5: "I’ve downloaded this app twice and deleted it twice because of the notification issues. Even after completing a habit, the reminders keep coming. I had one set for 6 a.m., and after I finished it, the habit disappeared from the app — so I had no way to delete or manage it anymore, yet the notifications kept coming for about a month. I also created another habit for a future date, but reminders started weeks too early. Really frustrating bug that makes the app hard to use. Please fix the notification system."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 24, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _beexgrant_, Jun 24, 2026, 2/5: "This app requires me to restore the purchase constantly even though u purchased a lifetime subscription. It’s annoying that I have to jump through hoops to use something I’ve already purchased. Stop trying to sell me stuff and give me what I purchased! Other than that it’s okay. Rather use any other free app at this point."
            2. _A Sprz_, Jul 11, 2026, 3/5: "The app is beautiful. Love the customization. I got a lifetime subscription and am happy to not have to pay annually. Could you please consider adding the ability to increase the font size? It would be perfect then."
            3. _Hermione: Daughter of God_, Jul 1, 2026, 5/5: "So far, so good. I’ve never bright a premium on an app, but this one I just might because it’s not overpriced and seems to have a great layout and system."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 2, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Atomicbox_, Jul 2, 2026, 4/5: "I use this app all the time, it’s great and I love it. It’s intuitive, easy, and makes a nice routine. My only wish is that I could add daily to do items as well. I absolutely recommend this to anyone looking for a Habit Tracker."
            2. _#booklover13_, Jul 17, 2026, 5/5: "Before using this app, I struggled with staying consistent and just felt relatively down because of that. But after finding this app and paying for the lifetime upgrade, I feel like I have genuinely built a healthier stronger life. I love being able to change the colors and customize my own habits as well as the ability to add a widget or shortcut feature. I do wish that for weekly/monthly tasks, it would be nice if the memo was that same length, as opposed to a daily memo. Or at least to have the option for a weekly/monthly memo for tracking workouts, finances, etc! Hope to see this in an update soon!"
